name: Darklord Dance
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>佚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>楽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>堕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Fusion Summon 1 DARK Fairy Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing monsters from your hand, field, and/or GY as material. The monster Special Summoned by this effect gains 1000 ATK. If Summoning a "Darklord" Fusion Monster this way, you can also use "Darklord" monsters your opponent controls as material. You can only activate 1 "Darklord Dance" per turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 DARK Fairy Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing monsters from your hand, field, and/or GY as material. The monster Special Summoned by this effect gains 1000 ATK. If Summoning a "Darklord" Fusion Monster this way, you can also use "Darklord" monsters your opponent controls as material. You can only activate 1 "Darklord Dance" per turn.

action: Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the opponent's field as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
